mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USER_SESSIONS.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USER_SESSIONS ( user_id, refresh_token, device_info, ip_address, user_agent, revoked_yn, expires_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{refreshToken}, #{deviceInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAgent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N', #{expiresAt}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USER_SESSIONS WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} AND revoked_yn = 'N' AND expires_at > SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul'
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_SESSIONS SET revoked_yn = 'Y', revoked_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
UPDATE USER_SESSIONS SET revoked_yn = 'Y', revoked_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} AND revoked_yn = 'N'
UPDATE USER_SESSIONS SET revoked_yn = 'Y', revoked_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_yn = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USER_SESSIONS WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
